name: mini-games
description: Player-facing chat games — seven games total: daily puzzles (Wordle, Hangman, Hot/Cold) and live rounds (Trivia, Scramble, Math Race, Reaction Race) with point scoring, leaderboards, and optional currency rewards.

liveRoundIntervalMinutes.description: Minimum minutes between automatic live rounds.

minPlayersForLiveRound.description: Minimum online players required to fire a live round.

liveRoundAnswerWindowSec.description: How long players have to answer a live round.

pointsToCurrencyRate.description: Currency paid per point. 0 disables currency rewards.

dailyPointsCapPerPlayer.description: Max points per UTC day per player. 0 = unlimited.

bigScoreThreshold.description: Scores at/above this emit a chat announcement.

triviaQuestionSource.description: Trivia source. 'api' fetches from Open Trivia DB; falls back to custom bank on failure.

triviaApiCategory.description: OpenTDB category keys. ['any'] = no filter. Multiple = random pick per round.

permissions.description: Admin commands: ban, reset, skip round, fire round, report.

minigames.helpText: Usage: /minigames [game] — Show help for all games or a specific game.

arguments.name: game
arguments.helpText: Optional game name to show rules for.

wordle.helpText: Usage: /wordle [guess] — No arg shows today's attempts; with 5-letter guess submits a guess.

hangman.helpText: Usage: /hangman [letter|word] — No arg shows board; letter guesses a letter; full word attempts solve.

arguments.name: letterOrWord
arguments.helpText: A single letter or the full word.

hotcold.helpText: Usage: /hotcold [number] — No arg shows attempts; number 1-1000 submits a guess.

answer.description: Answer the currently active live round.
answer.helpText: Usage: /answer <response> — Submit your answer to the active live round.

arguments.name: response
arguments.helpText: Your answer to the active live round.

minigamestats.helpText: Usage: /minigamestats [player] — Show lifetime and current-day stats.

arguments.name: player
arguments.helpText: Player name to look up (default: yourself).

arguments.name: category
arguments.helpText: Leaderboard category: points, wordle, hangman, or streak.

puzzle.helpText: Usage: /puzzle — Shows which daily puzzles you've played and time until rollover.

minigamesban.helpText: Usage: /minigamesban <player> [hours] — Ban permanently (no hours) or temporarily.

arguments.name: hours
arguments.helpText: Hours for temporary ban (omit for permanent).

minigamesresetstats.helpText: Usage: /minigamesresetstats <player> — Wipe all stats for a player.

arguments.name: player
arguments.helpText: Player name whose stats to reset.

minigamesskiproundnow.helpText: Usage: /minigamesskiproundnow — Cancel the active live round with no winner.

minigamesfirenow.helpText: Usage: /minigamesfirenow [game] — Start a live round now, optionally picking the game.

arguments.name: game
arguments.helpText: Game to fire (trivia, scramble, mathrace, reactionrace). Random if omitted.

minigamesreport.helpText: Usage: /minigamesreport — Send a lifetime stats report (total rounds, points, top 5, per-game breakdown).

onChatMessage.description: Catch raw chat for Reaction race winner detection.

onPlayerDisconnect.description: Soft cleanup on player disconnect (sessions persist).

rolloverDailyPuzzles.description: At UTC midnight: pick new daily puzzles (Wordle, Hangman, Hot/Cold) and clear yesterday's sessions.

fireLiveRound.description: If enough time elapsed and enough players online, fire a random enabled live game.

closeLiveRound.description: If active live round has expired with no winner, close it and announce the answer.

refreshLeaderboards.description: Aggregate player stats and write leaderboard cache.

expireWindows.description: Delete daily point window variables from the prior UTC day.

expireBans.description: Remove temporary bans whose expiry timestamp has passed.
